# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd no mtls and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: production
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        allow:
        - from:
            service:
              name: backend
              namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: frontend
  rules:
  - from:
    - service:
        name: backend
        namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: production
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        allow:
        - from:
            service:
              name: frontend
              namespace: production
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: backend
  rules:
  - from:
    - service:
        name: frontend
        namespace: production
